productDisplayName: Spykar Men Ranger Green Bl Checks Green Shirts
description: Composition Cuban green checked shirt made of 100% cotton, with white and grey accents, short sleeves with a black hem, front buttoned placket, collar with black tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, flap buttoned chest pockets, embroidered branding above left pocket and curved hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water Wash only with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron Celebrate the baseball champs of 1992 – the West Tribes – in style in this spykar checked shirt. Designed for style and comfort, be the cynosure of all eyes while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and sports shoes to look like the king of casual wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6’1”; Chest: 38.5”; Shoulders: 18.5”
